---
name: MVP Feature
about: Track a scoped MVP implementation task for the Research Dossier Platform
title: "[DOS-XXX] "
labels: ["mvp", "feature"]
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the user-visible or architecture-visible change in one short paragraph.

## Goal

State the core purpose of this ticket.

## Scope

- Include the concrete deliverables.
- Keep the work constrained to one primary concern.
- Split the ticket if the scope grows beyond one focused day.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Define the visible or testable conditions for completion.
- Prefer concrete outcomes over implementation details.

## Dependencies

- List required upstream tickets or write `None`.

## Validation

- List the commands, flows, or checks that prove the ticket is complete.

## Notes

Add implementation notes, tradeoffs, or follow-up observations if needed.
